title: x-harness Packet
description: Schema for an x-harness claim packet

schema_version.description: Schema version of the packet format

task_id.description: Task identifier that this packet belongs to

type.description: Packet type — claim only for this implementation

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the packet was created

previous_packet_id.description: ID of the previous packet in the chain, or null for root

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the canonical JSON payload
